recipe.title: French Toast Casserole and Sausage
steps: Preheat oven to 425°F. Butter a 13x9 inch baking pan.
Melt butter in saucepan over medium heat. Stir in brown sugar until dissolved and smooth. Pour into bottom of 9x13 pan and spread evenly.
Add bread cubes on top of brown sugar/butter mixture.
Whisk together eggs, milk, vanilla, and 1 tsp cinnamon in a medium bowl. Pour over bread, ensuring all pieces are saturated. Sprinkle with remaining 1 tsp cinnamon and 1 tbsp brown sugar.
Bake 25–30 minutes until golden brown. Top with powdered sugar if desired.
Meanwhile, brown sliced sausage in a skillet over medium-high heat until cooked through and slightly caramelized.
